name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES state, turn, N
CONSTANTS N

(* State definitions *)
Idle(i) == state[i] = "idle"
Trying(i) == state[i] = "trying"
Critical(i) == state[i] = "critical"

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ N ∈ Nat
        /\ N > 0
        /\ state ∈ [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ turn ∈ 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [i ∈ 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i ∈ 1..N : /\ Idle(i)
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
                     /\ turn' = turn
        \/ \E i ∈ 1..N : /\ Trying(i)
                     /\ turn = i
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
                     /\ turn' = turn
        \/ \E i ∈ 1..N : /\ Critical(i)
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
                     /\ turn' = (i % N) + 1

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* fork ownership: forks[i] = j means philosopher j owns fork i; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
(* philosopher states: states[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = -1 \/ forks[i] \in 1..N

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = "thinking"
    /\ forks[i] = -1
    /\ forks[Mod(i,N)+1] = -1
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Mod(i,N)+1] = i]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks[i] = i
    /\ forks[Mod(i,N)+1] = i
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![Mod(i,N)+1] = -1]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = "thinking"
    /\ forks[i] = -1
    /\ forks[Mod(i,N)+1] = -1
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = "hungry"
    /\ forks[i] = -1
    /\ forks[Mod(i,N)+1] = -1
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Mod(i,N)+1] = i]
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ states[i] = "hungry"
    /\ forks[i] = -1
    /\ forks[Mod(i,N)+1] = -1
    /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>> /\ TypeOK

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  /\ head' = head
  /\ tail' = tail
  /\ q' = q
  /\ 
    (* Queue is empty *)
    (head = tail /\ q[head] = 0) 
    -> 
      (* Wait: no state change *)
      UNCHANGED <<head, tail, q>>
  \/ 
    (* Queue is not empty *)
    (head <> tail /\ q[head] # 0) 
    -> 
      /\ consume(q[head])
      /\ head' = head + 1
      /\ IF head' > K THEN head' := 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<tail, q>>
  \/ 
    (* Queue is full *)
    (head <> tail /\ q[head] = 0 /\ q[tail] = 0) 
    -> 
      (* Wait: no state change *)
      UNCHANGED <<head, tail, q>>
  \/ 
    (* Queue is not full *)
    (head <> tail /\ q[head] = 0 /\ q[tail] # 0) 
    -> 
      /\ produce(q[tail])
      /\ tail' = tail + 1
      /\ IF tail' > K THEN tail' := 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<head, q>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<head, tail, q>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Remove(readers, 1)
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK == /\ readers \in Seq(Nat)
          /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, defaultValue

VARIABLE store

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to a default value *)
Init == /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> defaultValue]

(* Get operation *)
Get(k) == store[k]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys, v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        \/ /\ \E k \in Keys :
          /\ store' = store
          /\ \E v \in Values :
              /\ store[k] = v
              /\ Get(k) = v

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, ballots, values

TypeOK == 
    /\ acceptors \in SUBSET 1..N
    /\ proposers \in SUBSET 1..M
    /\ promises \in acceptors -> (⊥ \/ [ballot: Nat, value: Nat])
    /\ accepts \in acceptors -> (⊥ \/ [ballot: Nat, value: Nat])
    /\ chosen \in Nat \/ ⊥
    /\ ballots \in proposers -> Nat
    /\ values \in proposers -> Nat

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ acceptors = 1..N
    /\ proposers = 1..M
    /\ promises = [a \in acceptors |-> ⊥]
    /\ accepts = [a \in acceptors |-> ⊥]
    /\ chosen = ⊥
    /\ ballots = [p \in proposers |-> 0]
    /\ values = [p \in proposers |-> 0]

(* Prepare phase: proposer p sends a proposal with ballot b *)
Prepare(p, b) == 
    /\ p \in proposers
    /\ b > ballots[p]
    /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = b]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, values>>

(* Promise phase: acceptor a responds to proposal with ballot b *)
Promise(a, p, b) == 
    /\ a \in acceptors
    /\ p \in proposers
    /\ b = ballots[p]
    /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> values[p]]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, accepts, chosen, ballots, values>>

(* Accept phase: proposer p sends accept request with ballot b and value v *)
Accept(p, b, v) == 
    /\ p \in proposers
    /\ b = ballots[p]
    /\ v = values[p]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, promises, chosen, ballots, values>>

(* Accepted phase: acceptor a accepts proposal with ballot b and value v *)
Accepted(a, p, b, v) == 
    /\ a \in acceptors
    /\ p \in proposers
    /\ b = ballots[p]
    /\ v = values[p]
    /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, promises, chosen, ballots, values>>

(* Choose phase: proposer p chooses value v if it has majority of accepts with ballot b *)
Choose(p, b, v) == 
    /\ p \in proposers
    /\ b = ba

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE

(* The file is represented as a sequence of bytes *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ file \in Seq(0..255)
    /\ chunks \in Seq(0..255)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(0..255)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ channel \in Seq(0..255)

(* Initialize the file and split it into chunks *)
Init == 
    /\ file \in Seq(0..255)
    /\ chunks == SubSeq(file, 1, CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks == <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount == 0
    /\ channel == <<>>

(* Transmit a chunk over the channel *)
Transmit == 
    /\ sentChunks' == Append(sentChunks, Last(chunks))
    /\ channel' == Append(channel, Last(chunks))
    /\ retransmitCount' == 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

(* Retransmit the last sent chunk *)
Retransmit == 
    /\ sentChunks' == sentChunks
    /\ channel' == Append(channel, Last(sentChunks))
    /\ retransmitCount' == retransmitCount + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

(* Drop the last sent chunk from the channel *)
Drop == 
    /\ sentChunks' == sentChunks
    /\ channel' == SubSeq(channel, 1, Len(channel) - 1)
    /\ retransmitCount' == retransmitCount
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks>>

(* The sender can either transmit a new chunk, retransmit the last chunk, or drop the last chunk *)
Next == 
    \/ /\ Len(sentChunks) < Len(chunks)
       /\ Transmit
    \/ /\ Len(sentChunks) = Len(chunks)
       /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
       /\ Retransmit
    \/ /\ Len(sentChunks) = Len(chunks)
       /\ retransmitCount = MAX_RETRIES
       /\ Drop

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES data, txns, snapshot, writeSet, status

TxId == [id: Nat, start: Nat, end: Nat]

TxStatus == {"active", "committed", "aborted"}

Data == [k: Nat |-> Nat]

Txns == [t: TxId |-> TxStatus]

Snapshot == [t: TxId |-> [k: Nat |-> Nat]]

WriteSet == [t: TxId |-> SUBSET Nat]

Status == [t: TxId |-> TxStatus]

Init ==
    /\ data = [k: Nat |-> 0]
    /\ txns = [t: TxId |-> "active"]
    /\ snapshot = [t: TxId |-> data]
    /\ writeSet = [t: TxId |-> {}]
    /\ status = [t: TxId |-> "active"]

BeginTxn ==
    /\ \E t: TxId : t \notin DOMAIN txns
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = data]
    /\ writeSet' = [writeSet EXCEPT ![t] = {}]
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]

Read(k) ==
    /\ \E t: TxId : t \in DOMAIN txns /\ status[t] = "active"
    /\ k \in DOMAIN snapshot[t]
    /\ \E v: Nat : v = snapshot[t][k]

Write(k, v) ==
    /\ \E t: TxId : t \in DOMAIN txns /\ status[t] = "active"
    /\ k \in DOMAIN data
    /\ writeSet' = [writeSet EXCEPT ![t] = writeSet[t] \cup {k}]
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]

Commit(t) ==
    /\ t \in DOMAIN txns
    /\ status[t] = "active"
    /\ \A k \in writeSet[t] : \E t': TxId : t' \in DOMAIN txns /\ status[t'] = "active" /\ t' # t /\ k \in writeSet[t']
    /\ data' = [data EXCEPT ![k] = snapshot[t][k] : k \in writeSet[t]]
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]

Abort(t) ==
    /\ t \in DOMAIN txns
    /\ status[t] = "active"
    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]

Next ==
    \/ BeginTxn
    \/ \E t, k, v : Read(k)
    \/ \E t, k, v : Write(k, v)
    \/ \E t : Commit(t)
    \/ \E t : Abort(t)

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, txns, snapshot, writeSet, status>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ data \in Data
    /\ txns \in [TxId |-> TxStatus]
    /\ snapshot \in [TxId |-> Dat

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLE clocks

Init == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = 0

Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + 1
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + \E j \in 1..N : (j \ne i) : (clocks[j] - clocks[i]) / N

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks>>

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]

Invariant == \A i \in 1..N : \A j \in 1..N : |clocks[i] - clocks[j]| <= epsilon

Safety == Invariant

Liveness == \A i \in 1..N : <> (clocks[i] = 0)

Property == Safety /\ Liveness

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks>> /\ Property

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

(* TypeOK: free is a subset of Pages, allocated is a function from Clients to subsets of Pages *)
TypeOK == free \subseteq Pages /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]

(* Init: all pages are free, no client has any pages allocated *)
Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

(* Allocate: client c requests a page p from free *)
Allocate(c, p) == /\ c \in Clients
                    /\ p \in free
                    /\ free' = free \ {p}
                    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
                    /\ UNCHANGED << allocated >>

(* Release: client c releases page p back to free *)
Release(c, p) == /\ c \in Clients
                   /\ p \in allocated[c]
                   /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                   /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
                   /\ UNCHANGED << allocated >>

(* Next: either Allocate or Release *)
Next == \E c \in Clients, p \in Pages : Allocate(c, p) \/ Release(c, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<< free, allocated >>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants

turn \in {1, 2}
wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]

Init == 
  /\ turn \in {1, 2}
  /\ wants \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
  /\ turn = 1
  /\ wants = [1 |-> FALSE, 2 |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants[1] = FALSE
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
     /\ turn' = 2
  \/ /\ turn = 2
     /\ wants[2] = FALSE
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![2] = TRUE]
     /\ turn' = 1
  \/ /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants[1] = TRUE
     /\ wants[2] = TRUE

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

(* Type invariant: counts is a function from Node to a function from Node to Nat *)
TypeOK == counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]

(* Initial state: all counts are zero *)
Init == counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

(* Increment operation: node n increments its own slot *)
Increment(n) == counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = @ + 1]

(* Merge operation: node n merges its counts with those of node m *)
Merge(n, m) ==
  counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][k] = Max(@, counts[m][k]) : k \in Node]

(* Next-state relation: either an increment or a merge *)
Next == \E n \in Node : Increment(n) \lor \E m \in Node : Merge(n, m)

(* Total count: sum over all nodes of the maximum count for each node *)
Total == \Sum n \in Node : Max(counts[][n])

(* Specification: initial state and next-state relation *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts
